dialogos.texto_en: Sooorry to intruuude!
I'll be in your care from today.\nNice to meet you again, Futaro-kun.
Y-yeah.
Speaking of which,\nweren't there supposed to be only two beds in this room?\nIs this okay?
It's fine,\nI asked for an extra bed to be brought in. See?
Ah, there's another small bed!\nSo, it can also be a room for three people.
Well, since I'm the one who's intruding,\nI'll use the small bed.
No, I'll use it.\nRaiha and Ichika, you use the normal beds.
But%p-2;――
If it's okay, why don't I use the small bed?\nI am the smallest one here, after all.
Big bro, don't be shy. You too, Ichika-san.\nYou can use those beds over there, okay?
Thank you, Raiha-chan.\nThen, I'll take you up on your offer.
Alright, I've finished organizing my things.\nI'm going to visit Yotsuba-san's room.
Huh?
Don't worry, I'll be back before bedtime. See ya.
See you.
Really...?
Hm? What?
N-no, nothing.
(It's not nothing, isn't it?\n You're so nervous\n because it's just the two of us now, right?)
(Although... I feel the same way!)
(Uwaaah, what should I do?!\n I suggested this myself, but being alone\n with Futaro-kun is making my heart race!)
(Maybe it's because it's a place I'm not familiar with?\n It felt like inviting Futaro-kun to my room,\n but it's completely different.)
(Thanks to Raiha-chan's thoughtfulness...\n this has become a problem.)
(Umm, anyway, let's simulate what \n living together is like as planned!)
(Now, as the eldest sister, I have peace of mind \nabout living my life with Futaro-kun. Right...)
(We're just going to sleep tonight, right?\n What should we do before sleeping...)
For starters, should I make the bed?\nI'm used to living in hotels for long periods of time,\nso I don't mind.
No, the hotel staff has taken care of it,\nso it's already ready for us.
Y-yeah, you're right!\nAhaha!
(I-I messed up all of a sudden!\n Futaro-kun might think I'm a weirdo!)
Sh-shall I help you change clothes?\nIt's more comfortable to wear pajamas!
N-no, I can do that myself!
Ahahaaa, of course.
On the other hand, you wouldn't help me change my clothes\nor...anything like that, right?
Obviously...
(Uwawa, what am I saying?!\n I'm way too nervous!)
(Calm down, be more normal!\n As if living with Futaro-kun is the standard,\n like it's natural!)
(...Like it's natural...!)
H-hey, Ichika?
O-oh!\nThen, shall we take a bath together?\nYou haven't taken a bath yet, right, Futaro-kun?
Now, as a special service,\nI'll wash your back!
Th-that's DEFINITELY way too much, right?!
Y-you're right!
(No way!\n I have no composure as the older sister!)
(Or, well, I'm excited!\n I'm too excited because I'm alone with Futaro-kun!)
(I said such serious stuff to everyone, and I meant it!\n But when it comes to this, I can't help being excited!)
Hey, Ichika?
Wh-what is it?!
It's okay...not to be so considerate, you know?\nThis is my room, but it's also your room.\nJust relax and make yourself at home.
I-I guess.
(*sigh*\n Maybe this isn't just\n a cohabitation simulation anymore.)
(But, this in itself...it feels nice.\n Just being in the same space as Futaro-kun%p-2;――%p;)
I'm baaack.\nYotsuba-san already seemed so sleepy,\nso I came right back.
Welcome back!
Heehee, you both look refreshed, ya know?\nLike newlyweds.
New—?!\nD-don't say weird things!
Ahaha...
Would it have been better if I hadn't come back yet?\nAm I being a bother?
Don't be dumb!\nWe're sightseeing again tomorrow morning!\nI'm going to bed!
Oh! Big bro, you haven't taken a bath yet,\nhave you? You sweat a lot today, didn't you?
I'll take one tomorrow morning!
Nooo waaay!\nPlease make sure to clean yourself properly\nbefore sleeping!
(Teehee! Futaro-kun is just like a child.\n He's just so cute...)
(To think I find him cute even in situations like this.\n Futaro-kun, I really%p-2;――%p;)
Love you.
Hm? Ichika-san, did you say something?
No, nothing.
Anyway, instead of that,\nwhy don't we take a bath together?\nLet's wash each other's backs.
Yeah. Let's just leave sulking big bro behind.
I-I'm not sulking!
